name: python3-gps3
title: python3-gps3
description:
GPSD interface (Python 3)
This package contains GPSD interface and defaults to host=’127.0.0.1’,
port=2947, gpsd_protocol=’json’ in two classes.
- GPSDSocket creates a GPSD socket connection & request/retrieve GPSD
output.
- DataStream unpacks the streamed gpsd data into python dictionaries.
.
These dictionaries are literated from the JSON data packet sent from the GPSD.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-gps3 because GPSD interface (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-gps3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-gps3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-gps3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
